pr_title: fix: use message.content instead of model_dump() for assistant turn
pr_description: Fix assistant turn serialization in `identify_potential_levers.py` (BUG-A from synthesis 1) `model_dump()` returns a Python dict which gets coerced via `repr()` into malformed continuation context Initial fix used `message.content`, but analysis iteration 2 revealed this is `None` for function-calling models (OpenAI, Anthropic) Final fix: `message.content or raw.model_dump_json()` — uses the string content when available, falls back to proper JSON serialization
